strings.site.name: CodeWF
strings.site.description: CodeWF aggregates .NET articles, projects, and online tools.
strings.site.keywords: .NET,C#,ASP.NET Core,Razor Pages,dev tools,tech articles,open source projects,CodeWF
strings.nav.blogLead: Read articles first, then browse by topic or category
strings.project.description: Browse CodeWF's open source projects and NuGet package descriptions, quickly locate content by topic.
strings.project.intro: Open source projects, NuGet packages, and corresponding documentation are organized here for easy reference and ongoing maintenance.
strings.project.emptyDescription: You can check back later, or browse technical articles in the blog.
strings.project.notFoundTitle: Project does not exist or has been deleted
strings.project.notFoundDescription: Return to the project center to view other content.
strings.search.description: Search for tools, projects, and technical articles within the site.
strings.search.descriptionWithQuery: View search results for tools, projects, and technical articles related to {0}.
strings.search.pageDescription: A single entry point to retrieve site content, prioritizing the most relevant tools, project documentation, and technical articles.
strings.search.inputPlaceholder: Enter project, tool, or article keyword
strings.search.emptyTitle: Enter a keyword to start searching
strings.search.emptyDescription: You can directly search for project names, package names, tool names, article titles, or technical keywords in the content.
strings.search.noResultsDescription: Try shorter keywords, or directly search for core terms in project names, package names, tool names, and article titles.
strings.footer.tagline: Technical articles, project documentation & online tools
strings.language.title: Language
strings.tool.description: Browse CodeWF's online development tools to improve daily development efficiency.
strings.tool.title: Online Tools
strings.tool.intro: A collection of small tools organized for daily development scenarios, prioritizing high-frequency, straightforward, and immediately usable capabilities.
strings.tool.emptyDescription: More small tools closely related to development workflows can be added here later.
strings.tool.noMatchesDescription: Try a different tool name, group, or slug.
strings.friendLinks.emptyDescription: Site links can be added here later.
strings.friendLinks.title: Friend Links
strings.about.description: Learn about CodeWF's positioning, content direction, and maintenance philosophy.
strings.about.emptyDescription: The detailed About page content has not been loaded yet. Please check back later.
strings.about.intro: CodeWF focuses on .NET and engineering practice, turning reusable knowledge, searchable project notes, and practical tools into stable entry points.
strings.about.title: A technical site connecting articles, projects, and tools
strings.album.defaultDescription: Read serialized content continuously, better suited to systematic learning by topic.
strings.album.emptyDirectoryDescription: All topics will be shown here later.
strings.album.emptyPostsDescription: Return to the blog home page, or switch to another topic to continue browsing.
strings.album.emptyPostsTitle: No articles under this topic yet
strings.blog.categoriesDescription: Browse by category to find the technical topics you want faster.
strings.blog.description: Browse CodeWF blog content and view the latest technical articles by time.
strings.blog.emptyDescription: The blog list is empty. Future content will appear here.
strings.blog.emptyRandom: A rotating set of articles worth opening will appear here.
strings.blog.intro: This section contains site articles covering .NET, desktop development, engineering practice, and general development topics.
strings.blog.start.categoryDescription: {0} articles, suitable for quickly filtering by technical direction
strings.blog.title: Technical Articles
strings.category.descriptionWithName: View technical articles under the {0} category.
strings.category.defaultDescription: Focus on articles under the same technical theme for easier continuous reading by direction.
strings.category.emptyDirectoryDescription: All article categories will be shown here later.
strings.category.emptyPostsDescription: You can visit the home page or blog list to see other content first.
strings.category.emptyPostsTitle: No articles in this category yet
strings.donation.description: If CodeWF's content has helped you, you are welcome to support ongoing updates through donations.
strings.donation.intro: If the content and tools here have helped you, donations are welcome to support continued maintenance and updates.
strings.donation.sidebarDescription: If you are not donating now, you are still welcome to keep reading, subscribe, or send feedback.
strings.donation.sidebarTitle: You can also continue from here
strings.donation.title: Donate and Support
strings.home.emptyDescription: You can browse articles or projects first.
strings.home.emptyRandom: Content is being organized. More random discovery entries will be added later.
strings.home.heroDescription: Deep dives into frameworks, source practice, toolchains, and real project experience, preserving reusable technical judgment.
strings.home.heroTitle: Recording .NET and modern development from an engineering perspective
strings.home.start.albumDescription: {0} articles, suitable for continuous reading by topic
strings.home.start.categoryDescription: {0} articles, suitable for quickly understanding the site's content structure

strings.timeline.description: View timeline records for CodeWF site and content development.

strings.timeline.intro: Review site iterations and content milestones on a timeline so long-term work is easier to perceive.
